The '''Geonosian executioner cart''' was a small cart that was pulled along by an animal, commonly used by the [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosians]] that took victims to the [[Petranaki arena]] for [[Death/Legends|execution]].

==History==
At least one of these carts was used in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the attempted [[Death/Legends|execution]] of [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. It was also used, first as a mount, and later as cover in the subsequent [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] by both Amidala and Skywalker.

{{Veh-stub}}
